text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
210 
LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT 
LABEL: 
Plan Offers Limited benefit above the Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers limited benefit above ICL. This limited benefit is not 
considered Gap Coverage. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: LIMITED_GAP_BENEFIT 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not
